items.title: Cloud provisioning timeout constants duplicated across 4 provider files — not in config/defaults.ts
items.intent: All cloud provisioning timeout constants have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No timeout literals appear in provider files.
items.description: CLOUD_API_TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000 is duplicated identically in aws.ts:46, hetzner.ts:32, gcp.ts:46, and digitalocean.ts. CLOUD_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS and CLOUD_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS are also defined inline per provider. Per project convention, magic numbers belong in config/defaults.ts. Steps: (1) grep provider files for all timeout constant definitions; (2) add CLOUD_API_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS to config/defaults.ts; (3) replace all inline literals with imports; (4) run cloud/provisioning tests. Scope: 4-5 files, no logic change.
acceptanceCriteria: No timeout constants duplicated across provider files
CLOUD_API_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS defined once in config/defaults.ts
All provider files import timeout constants from defaults
cloud/provisioning tests pass with no regression
items.groomingNotes: STEPS ADDED. Note: description says CLOUD_API_TIMEOUT_MS but actual local names in provider files are API_TIMEOUT_MS (no CLOUD_ prefix) — steps reflect reality. GCP and DO have a 3rd timeout at 600_000 (OP_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS / SNAPSHOT_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS) — consolidated to CLOUD_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS. Already readyForSprint=true.

items.title: Provisioning flow does not generate or store SSH keypair — FEAT-005 deploy update is undeliverable
items.intent: Every provisioned cloud agent has an SSH keypair generated at provision time, stored securely, and linked in the deploy state. clawhq deploy update has a viable SSH path to every cloud agent it created.
items.description: ProvisionedInstance interface (src/cloud/provisioning/types.ts) has no sshKeyPath or keypairPath field. The provisioning wizard does not generate an SSH keypair or inject it via cloud-init. Without a keypair, clawhq deploy update --id <agent-id> has no way to connect to the remote agent — FEAT-005 is architecturally undeliverable until this is resolved. Steps: (1) Add sshKeyPath: string field to ProvisionedInstance interface. (2) During provisioning wizard, generate an Ed25519 keypair (ssh-keygen or node:crypto), store private key at ~/.clawhq/keys/<agent-id>.pem (mode 0600), store public key path in ProvisionedInstance.sshKeyPath. (3) Inject public key via cloud-init user_data (authorized_keys). (4) Save sshKeyPath to deploy state file on disk. (5) Run cloud/provisioning tests. Scope: types.ts + provisioning wizard + 1-2 provider files for cloud-init injection. No logic change to existing deploy flow.
items.groomingNotes: READY. ProvisionedInstance confirmed in types.ts:285-306 — no sshKeyPath field exists. wizard.ts confirmed no keypair generation code. cloud-init.ts has generateCloudInit function needing pubKey param. Scope: 3 files (types.ts, wizard.ts, cloud-init.ts). node:crypto is built-in — no new deps. Steps prescriptive with file locations. Unblocks FEAT-005.
